ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team participating in the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team participating in the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game belongs to */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the game in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_name FOREIGN KEY ("player_name") REFERENCES team_rosters ("player_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting line */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game this line belongs to */,
  "ego" REAL /* Expected game outcome (EGO) */,
  "spread" REAL /* Spread for the game */,
  "spread_target" TEXT /* Target spreads for comparison */,
  "over_under" REAL /* Over/under for the game */,
  "money_line" REAL /* Money line for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_lines_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pick */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respective betting line */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the pick */,
  "pick" TEXT /* Team chosen for the pick */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the pick (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES betting_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bettor, analyst) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Account balance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the betting line */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount bet by the user */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was placed */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win/loss status of the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES betting_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., game analysis, betting trends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the payment method belongs to */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_info" TEXT /* Payment method information (e.g., card number, bank account) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
